title: Clutch-Rating Law: Extrapolating a Hidden Poly-Exp Formula
strategies: constant baseline: emit the mean training clutch-rating (reproduces the checker baseline ~0.1)
linear least squares: fit y ~ c0 + sum ci*xi and emit the linear closed form (moderate extrapolation)
structure discovery + refit: recover the poly-exp basis (quadratics, cross-terms, exp) and refit its coefficients by least squares for far better extrapolation
parsimony trade-off: drop weak basis terms to reduce the complexity penalty while keeping held-out fit
